test 4 on ldiskfs also hangs with these processes:

 27320 ?        Ss     0:00 lhsmtool_posix --daemon --hsm-root /tmp/arc1/sanity-pcc.test_4/ --archive 2 /mnt/lustre
27337 pts/0    R+   21114661:08 /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/tests/mmap_sanity -d /mnt/lustre/d4.sanity-pcc -m /mnt/lustre2/d4.sanity-pcc -e 7

is it really supposed to run mmap_sanity in busyloop mode?
